title: Elbaf’s History Darkens
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, World Government, Celestial Dragons as The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.
scene: The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ginny! You're safe! What a relief!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now it's up to the information to relay it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: don't be loud... you two... and don't do anything rash...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Moron! Do '10J want to die with not knowledge of where they are takingk us?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 'You need to try if 'you want to' be saved!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Miracles are not so easy to come by!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: President of the World Economic Journal

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So... There are still slaves with spirit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be CoY! You guys must've caught wind of that transmission too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's skip to the part where you pay me off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You'd rather keep this story quiet, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's just some kid running a local paper with a fancy name! How does he keep getting intel like this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't push your luck! You'll be erased

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kuwa ha ha! Just try and stop me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fools, I'm gonna leak news to pirate Island either way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This smells fishy... Can we trust this source?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no doubt about it. The Navy's in turmoil.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's gonna be a prize in a celestial dragon tournament?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So those damn government bastards were the ones who kidnapped her?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I always figured that was a Baseless rumor.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like they're putting devil fruits up for grabs too, Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These fruits could be perfect for my kids!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What if this is some sort of trap?!

summary: This part advances the A Hunted Bloodline through 52 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
